{{Infobox character
| name = Denner Weeks
| introduced = House of Blades
| name = Denner Weeks
| aliases = Denner
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = one of Valin's true children, master of Valin, Traveler behind the King, Valinhall Traveler, Traveler
| abilities = Dragon's Fang, summon a spear from the armory
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Denner Weeks Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner Weeks, also known as Denner, is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] characterized by his unkempt appearance, often wearing worn brown clothing and sporting facial stubble. He is known to be a somewhat unpredictable figure who frequently visits [[the House]] for short periods before departing without notice. Despite his casual demeanor and tendency to rest when not required to perform duties, he possesses significant combat capabilities. He utilizes a weapon known as a [[Dragon's Fang]] and has demonstrated the ability to leap onto buildings and summon weaponry from an armory. Denner also carries a large red-and-gold book titled [[Hariman]], which serves as his advisor. While he is described as appearing more normal than other [[Travelers]], he is capable of immense feats, such as traveling to an Overlord and defeating attackers in a very short timeframe. He has also demonstrated unique abilities, such as the use of a technique he calls the glass bell.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Denner Weeks]] has been scouting in [[Bel Calem]] for almost six months.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Denner is a rough-looking man and an old friend of [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Denner advised [[Simon]] regarding the trial.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Denner has a talking book named [[Hariman]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A former master of [[Valin]] and one of the deity's true children to pass his test, Denner Weeks is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who once allowed people to exit [[Valinhall]]. Clad in a brown cloak, he carries a massive red-and-gold book along with the [[Dragon's Fang]], a red-wrapped [[sword]]. While tasked with protecting the [[Asphodel Incarnation]] alongside Eli, he observed that [[Kai]] lacked the [[Nye essence]] and even attempted to persuade [[Benson]] to provide him with [[steel]]. Throughout his interactions, Denner maintained a presence near [[Simon]], offering smiles, pats on the back, and eventually leaving him a written note.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is a man with a giant book who allowed people out of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is someone [[Kai]] intends to alert.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is one of [[Valin]]'s true children who passed his test.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner told [[Simon]] that [[Kai]] lacks the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is a person who carries a [[Dragon's Fang]] and a huge red-and-gold book.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is present in the scene and smiles at [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is tasked with protecting the [[Asphodel Incarnation]] with Eli.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is a figure in a brown cloak.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner carries a red-wrapped [[sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner was once the master of [[Valin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner uses [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is a [[Traveler]] behind the King.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner tried to convince [[Benson]] to give him [[steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner patted [[Simon]] on the back.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Denner Weeks]] is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner responded to [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Denner left a note for [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner Weeks is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who typically remains within [[the House]] for only a day or two at a time. Despite [[Valin]]'s failed attempts to teach him to stop jumping around, Denner consistently seeks every opportunity to depart from [[the House]]. He was once a candidate for the [[Nye essence]], a role the [[Eldest]] ultimately passed over in favor of [[Simon]]. After going missing for several weeks, it was revealed that Denner had his [[Dragon's Fang]] removed. He also possesses the ability to summon a spear directly from the armory.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner is someone [[Valin]] failed to teach to stop jumping around.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who stays in [[the House]] for a day or two at a time.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner is a person the [[Eldest]] considered for the [[Nye essence]] instead of [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner takes every chance he can get to leave [[the House]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] has not heard from Denner in weeks.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner has had his [[Dragon's Fang]] removed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner can summon a spear from the armory.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Talos," Leah said, when he finally reached her, "this is Simon, son of Kalman, and Denner Weeks. They are Travelers of Valinhall."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“You see why it’s so useful?” Denner responded.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
